heading: Transferred
label: 5617 Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 5617 was editorially reclassified as , Crime Control and Law Enforcement.section 11117 of Title 34

Use of Court Orders To Place Juveniles in Secure Facilities, Jails and Lockups for Adults; Investigation and Report, , , directed Comptroller General of the United States, not later than 180 days after , to conduct an investigation of extent to which valid court orders and court orders other than valid court orders, used in the 5-year period ending on , to place juveniles in secure detention facilities, in secure correctional facilities, and in jails and lockups for adults, and submit, not later than 3 years after , a report to certain congressional committees of results of investigation.Pub.
